please_read_these_te:
Note: It will take 2 business days time to process the same from the day we receive the DNC request.
You will still receive service, transactional & EMI collection calls if you are an existing customer.
To ensure that you may not receive any unsolicited commercial calls please contact your telephone service provider for registration in national Do Not Call Register of Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI).
please_share_the_phone_numbers_that_you_: Please share the phone number(s) that you have received unsolicited calls from. This information will help us ensure that you are not contacted for any product promotion.
by_proceeding_you_agree_to_the_terms_con: It will take 2 days time to process the same from the day we receive the Do not call request.
